name: IdsEdwLoadDeniedClmsRunCycUpd

text.value: WITH CTE AS (SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'DENIED_CLAIMS' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND (RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSOptumRXRunCycle} OR RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSESIRunCycle}) GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD) UPDATE T SET T.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC T JOIN CTE ON T.SRC_SYS_CD = CTE.SRC_SYS_CD AND T.TRGT_SYS_CD = CTE.TRGT_SYS_CD AND T.SUBJ_CD = CTE.SUBJ_CD WHERE T.RUN_CYC_NO >= CTE.RUN_CYC_NO AND T.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'

Description:

Annotations:
Set EDW_LOAD_IN to 'Y'
Job Name:
IdsEdwLoadProdRunCycUpdExtr
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Denied Claims  with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle used for extracting.
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
EDW Capitation Load Indicator Update
Job Name: IdsEdwLoadDeniedClmsRunCycUpd

Description: This Job update the P_RUN_CYC  table after the DENIED CLAIMS are updated on the EDW Table.
Called from: IdsEdwMbrPdxDeniedClaimCntl
